Adamantite Bo Stick  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Blunt Atk Delay: 30
DMG: 19 Dmg Bonus: 120
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
Effect: Lightning Storm (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 30
WT: 6.5 Size: LARGE
Class: MNK BST
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Adamantite Bo Stick
Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Blunt Atk Delay: 30
DMG: 19 Dmg Bonus: 120

Post Comment
Still drops
QuoteReply
# Jan 08 2015 at 6:06 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1652660183901
3 posts
If anyone is interested, this dropped today in Old Seb from the frog krup knight.


Does NOT drop in Dalnir according to SOE support:

Greetings Wyled,

This is Senior GM *****.

I tried to contact you in game, but you were not available. I see the Adamantite Bo Stick dropping in Old Sebilis, but not in Crypt of Dalnir. I hope this information helps to resolve this issue and good luck to you!

Thank you again for taking the time to contact the SOE Customer Service team. If you wish to take a satisfaction survey, please follow this link: https://soe.typeform.com/to/yeFjlF.

Sincerely,

Senior GM *****
In-Game CSR-EverQuest
Sony Online Entertainment
▲ Page top
earthshaker?
QuoteReply
# Dec 22 2006 at 4:35 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591912119559
2 posts


can this weapon be used in the same fashion of the earthshaker? as in pullin groups of mobs and wipin them almost instanly throught use of disc and aa's and whatever else? im sure that if it would work the first wave would proably hurt the monk/bst who used it
▲ Page top
How to avoid dmg
QuoteReply
# May 17 2005 at 10:38 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592344613605
Scholar
56 posts
Good info on this post. I would like to know the best way to use it though - tried it with my 36 BST and it proc'ed 3 times during a fight in Gunthak which starts to eat away at those hps pretty quickly. Is there a way to use it and step back to avoid dmg? Or is it just a matter of taking the bad with the good? Thanks for any instruction.
▲ Page top
How to avoid dmg
QuoteReply
# Dec 17 2006 at 1:39 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592246268336
Scholar
62 posts
I know this is over a year ago asked, but yes. You can step back a bit and avoid the 2nd and 3rd rains. The trick is to be able to still swing it at the mob while avoiding the rain. It is possible to avoid the 1st rain too, but hard to do.

Back in the days of Kunark being new (when 225pts of dmg was still within an inch of your life), this was known as "the suicide stick". lol

This was my monkey's main 2hb training weapon back when he was in his 30s and hunting Warslilks and Dalnir.
▲ Page top
NOT PVP DMG
QuoteReply
# Oct 24 2004 at 12:54 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591813489600
164 posts
you don't take PVP you take full just like a wizard nuking himself. My BST had one of these and even twinked he will get hit for 75 from time to time
▲ Page top
also
QuoteReply
# Jan 14 2004 at 7:23 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591779333933
55 posts
This is definately not sold at the 2 vendors noted. I'd send the correction in but I can't email by just clicking on the link and I'm too lazy to do it manually. ;)
▲ Page top
this weap
QuoteReply
# Jan 14 2004 at 7:10 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591779333933
55 posts
Yep, procs at level 30, 75 point MR rain. Really only useful for fighting giants. I used it with both my bst and my monk while fighting at the fort in FM. Lemme tell you, even tho they resist alot it helped immeasurably when soloing. Any mob giant sized or bigger means that when it procs, it's centered on that mobs upper body, which puts you out of range of the AE. Very nice.
Also not that bad of a ratio for a fairly easy to find weapon.
▲ Page top
Beastlord question
QuoteReply
# Dec 22 2003 at 9:51 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591798143015
28 posts
anyone know what lvl you can activate the effect at for a Beastlord? ? o , and when i use this weapon in battle it works great but occasionaly it says something like "you dont have the will to use this weapon"??...anyone know what that means? im a lvl 12 vah shir beastlord. thx for the help
▲ Page top
RE: Beastlord question
QuoteReply
# Dec 30 2003 at 9:22 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592257856985
4 posts
i have one and it procs at lvl 30... and be careful this weapon will kill you.





Kudamen Theaafrican lvl 52 beastlord
Terrew Marr
▲ Page top
RE: Beastlord question
QuoteReply
# Dec 24 2003 at 1:25 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591778835636
Guru
261 posts
Levels for effects or procs don't go based on class. It is level 30 for monk and beastlord. When it says "Your will is not strong enough to command this weapon." it means that at that moment if you were level 30+ it would proc Lightning Storm. This will only happen in combat by the way.
▲ Page top
You got ?s, We got Answers!
QuoteReply
# Aug 06 2003 at 11:16 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591789479139
3 posts
This does NOT affect party members and it'll proc both in and outdoors.
Take care and have fun!!
▲ Page top
Serves a Purpose.. . .well
QuoteReply
# Jul 08 2003 at 10:30 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759977732
Scholar
204 posts
For killing Giants, this ROCKS. I spent over 4 hours in Rathe and only one wave of one attack did I ever get too close to the target and take damage myself (35 hp damage).

Also I didn't know this, but it's not 75dd like the listing says above. It's 75dd x 3 waves or 225dd over 3 ticks.

Most of the time, this went off twice a battle with ~130 DEX which equates to 75 x 6 = 450 damage per fight with proc alone!

BTW, my warder (pet) appeared to be immune from the effects. Never harmed him once.

2 questions I still have on this:

1) Can a party member take damage from an AOE spell you cast (or just yourself)?
2) Does this work indoors or just out?
▲ Page top
LIGHTNING!!!
QuoteReply
# May 24 2003 at 10:17 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591789479139
3 posts
I got the bo stick at around level 20 or so and got up to 30 with it. We decided to quit using at 30 so I wouldn't kill myself with it. But, figured what the heck let's give it a shot. I love that stick! Even though I have killed myself a couple of times with it, (You have been slain by Barracuda??? OHHHH.) it's really awsome.
That 75 damage proc is very deadly. I got my magic resist to over 100 and my shammy friend bumps it up to 133. Also he gets my dex to about 180 with his dex buff. I have yet to stay out of its proc while fighting. But if you got a healer to support you like my shammy, I say proc away. This weapon slaughters things. (INCLUDING YOURSELF!) But its still alot of fun. I figure the couple of deaths, (Ok Ok maybe couple of dozen) have been worth it. If you have some money, grab a temperance buff in POK and you can take some proc. If you wanna kill something that's kinda pathetic as far as resist go, the geonids (if you can get to them) in crystal caverns are pretty good. Me and my friend were killing those things while they were red cons fairly easily and they have crap resist. But they can hit hard and I get haste while the mob gets slowed and that makes a HUGE difference. If you go in crystal alone go with a good fd skill or a slightly higher level than 30. Have fun and remember these two sayings, Lightning! and HEAL ME!!!!!
▲ Page top
Random Drop Table
QuoteReply
# Apr 13 2003 at 1:18 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759622592
12 posts
this just dropped off a Krup Ghoul Knight just outside the Crypt, a.k.a. PLA area.
▲ Page top
Procage
QuoteReply
# Mar 30 2003 at 1:48 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1598199386976
361 posts
If you MUST use this staff, when it procs, just back off. Run back a little, let it do its 3 waves, then fight again. Simple.
▲ Page top
I don't like this thing.
QuoteReply
# Mar 25 2003 at 10:29 AM Rating: Decent
Spiffe
Scholar
106 posts
I had this for a long time as I worked my way up, and while it was an ok 2HB for a low level, I was really looking forward to lev 30 when it started procing. Well, I finally got there, and what a letdown.

Yes, I'm aware of how to avoid taking too much damage from it, and in fact when I slapped on my resist gear and jacked my resists up to 70-80, I was usually taking about 25 pts of damage instead of 47. My problem is that the mobs resist the lightning storm quite frequently -- at least partial resist 75% of the time, I'd say, fighting stuff on the ledge in OT and at the giant fort in FM. So I'd end up with damage to myself, none to the mob, and all of the aggro. No thanks. It's possible I was just unlucky with the mobs, but I've had enough, I'm shopping around for something with a better dmg bonus and dmg/delay ratio now.
____________________________

Proc is nice ehh?
QuoteReply
# Mar 24 2003 at 9:39 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591785437324
6 posts
LOL People are talking about how it procs so much lol thats a good thing most time hehe. I got lvl 29 monk twinked hehe now gonna play him I get proc at next lvl so we gonna test this **** out, and burn the mobs. Have fun all!!

Not likely, someone probably just sold it to the NPC. They're available in abundance at the bazaar for 100 pp or less on my server, just go get it there.

▲ Page top
When Does it Proc?
QuoteReply
# Mar 12 2003 at 5:04 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591761147698
Sage
1,262 posts
Level 30. Its AoE so you can get caught in the blast radius. Mob takes full damage. You take PvP (about 2/3 dmg). It is possible when fighting giants to stand just outside the AoE and still hit the monster.
▲ Page top
what lvl does it proc at???
QuoteReply
# Feb 02 2003 at 5:44 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591781917105
11 posts
i have a 26 monk with it and i would like to know when it procs.

RE: what lvl does it proc at???
QuoteReply
# Feb 21 2003 at 11:09 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592760091460
27 posts
When you click the link that is given for the proc it tells you everything about the spell. It says level 24
▲ Page top
RE: what lvl does it proc at???
QuoteReply
# Feb 21 2003 at 8:51 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1594570765068
3 posts
The spell level is not the same as the level the weapon with it starts to proc. My monk is lvl 28 and the proc does not take yet, so it can't start at 24. Someone else mentioned 30 and that seems likely.

▲ Page top
Procs damage
QuoteReply
# Dec 01 2002 at 1:18 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592342668014
66 posts
I have one of these on the KB server. Did know what lightning storm was. Friend gave it to me. Cool stick if you doing more then one mob. But for singles, you will get your *** kicked by the mob. AOE does 75 to target, but if you don't have good resists, then you take some damage,as I do. And if it resist, then you take the dam and it does not. Good weapon until it procs. I do some good dam with it. Selling mine for 500 on KB since they seem to be rare find. Either ppl like em and are holding them, or they have not dropped much.

Good luck to all that have it.

Tilmon Longtale
43 season iskar monk
KB server

Was given this today by guildy. Good Find
QuoteReply
# Aug 11 2002 at 7:47 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592759453346
4 posts
Bought this in the Bazaar on Nameless for 75pp. Quite a nice find, I am actually able to solo well again as opposed to how I was doing with dual PSUs (even at 25 skill). I'm looking forward to the proc working at 30, but it's going to be a nice weapon and a great way to bring up my 2HB until I reach that point.


--Tirok
Korroth 23 Barbarian Beastlord
Rakaritz 21 Iksar Shaman
